ci_commands_discovered: cargo xlint - license and lint checks (from .cargo/config.toml)
cargo nextest run - test runner used in CI (not installed in env)
cargo deny check - security advisories and license checks (not installed)
cargo test --doc - doc tests (requires full build)
cargo doc --workspace --no-deps - doc generation (requires full build)

cargo xlint - requires building 'x' package which takes too long
notes: sui-keys was selected as the relevant package since the fix modifies external.rs in sui-keys
sui package requires libclang for rocksdb which isn't available in the container
All 4 p2p tests pass on the base commit
Existing f2p tests fail as expected since the gold patch isn't applied
